case_title: MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. VS. RAYMOND BUSCEMI et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. AS TO RESPONDENT BUSCEMI, RAYMOND DOES 1-5 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT BUSCEMI, RAYMOND $8,222.25 PRINCIPAL, $1,396.66 INTEREST, $192.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,811.51, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT BY COURT"
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO RESPONDENT BUSCEMI, RAYMOND

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (302/REQ) REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-31-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
COST BILL, $300.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,142.44 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A.

HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION ; NOTICE OF NON-APPEARNCE AT HEARING FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. HEARING SET FOR JAN-31-2006 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
